speaker: Unknown
text: Ah, Professor Derich... and Lord Baten.

speaker: Diederich
text: Hey, Argo.

speaker: Baten
text: We were just talkin' about ya!

speaker: Argo
text: You were?

speaker: Diederich
text: I was thinkin' of givin’ you some kinda special test since I know this is all nothin’ new to you.

speaker: Unknown
text: A-A special test...?

speaker: Baten
text: Excitin', huh!?

speaker: Argo
text: (More like terrifying...)

speaker: Unknown
text: What kind of test did you have in mind?

speaker: Diederich
text: That's what we were discussin'

speaker: Baten
text: He should hafta catch himself a shark! Yer not a real man until ya catch one or two o’ those suckers!

speaker: Diederich
text: I think he should steer the boat. The weather's nice and there’s plenty of wind.

speaker: Baten
text: Hey, Argo! You ever catch a shark?

speaker: Argo
text: No, I haven't.

speaker: Baten
text: C'mon then! Go get one!

speaker: Argo
text: But there aren’t any sharks around here, are there?

speaker: Baten
text: Ah, I guess that’s a problem, huh?

speaker: Diederich
text: That's not gonna work, is it *😐*

speaker: Baten
text: Tch. Guess we’ll hafta keep thinkin’...

speaker: Diederich
text: Hey, what about my idea?

speaker: Baten
text: Hmm... What to do...

speaker: Diederich
text:
I’m going to need your help.

Unknown
*[paw prints]*

speaker: Diederich
text: ...That's just the way he is. He doesn't give a damn about other people’s opinions.

speaker: Argo
text:
*I... I don’t understand why you’re here.*

Narration
*......*

???
*.......*

speaker: Argo
text: By the way Professor Derich, I never heard why you decided to go to the Knights College.

speaker: Diederich
text: Uh... I was accidentally doin' some piratin’ in Frontail’s waters.

speaker: Baten
text: They arrested him and nearly chopped his head off.

speaker: Unknown
text: What!

speaker: Diederich
text: Whether or not you're committin' a crime depends on the land or territorial waters you're tried in. Different countries have different laws... Us pirates got severe punishments in Frontail.

speaker: Baten
text: He tries to act all cool, but he came cryin' to me 'cause he was about to be executed.

speaker: Baten
text: He was all, "Bateeeeen! Help meeee! They're gonna kill meeeee!"

speaker: Diederich
text: Hey! I didn't say that! I've got dignity, bein' a professor and all!

speaker: Baten
text: Bullshit! Yer still nothin' but a little brat!

speaker: Diederich
text:
I’m going to need your help.

??? *paw prints*

speaker: Argo
text: (Is that how dragons view us mortals...?)

speaker: Argo
text: But you did help Professor Derich, right?

speaker: Baten
text: I caved and asked that Scheat to do somethin’ about it. Savin’s life was the least I could do.

speaker: Argo
text: That's what led to you becoming a Knights College professor?

speaker: Diederich
text: Celio, who’d been watchin’ my trial, saw some value in my piratin’ experiences.

speaker: Diederich
text: He got me to take the recruitment test and just like that, I was a professor.

speaker: Argo
text: Wow...

speaker: Baten
text: And I owed Lord Schithead a favor, so I reluctantly said yes to handin’ them over.

speaker: Baten
text: I knew the Knights College was full of prudes, but he was practically on the guillotine! He's lucky to be alive!

speaker: Diederich
text: You won't hear me complainin' about bein' a Knights College professor.

speaker: Baten
text: Even with all that whinin’ you do about missin’ the sea?

speaker: Diederich
text: Oh will you shut up already!

speaker: Argo
text: (Looks like even Professor Derich is no match for Lord Baten...)

speaker: Argo
text: How long have you known each other?

speaker: Baten
text: Not long. Barely even the blink of an eye!

speaker: Diederich
text: About five years. We worked together while I was a pirate.

speaker: Baten
text: That's like a second to me!

speaker: Argo
text: Uh... Why would a country’s dragon associate with pirates?

speaker: Diederich
text: Well... Do you know what a privateer is?

speaker: Unknown
text: A privateer...?

speaker: Diederich
text: As a licensed privateer, I was permitted to be an official government pirate.

speaker: Diederich
text: I just called myself a pirate, but I was more like a pirate of justice who beat up the vicious ones under the government’s orders.

speaker: Argo
text: Government-approved pirates...!?!

speaker: Baten
text: You call the way you beat 'em to a pulp "justice"?

speaker: Diederich
text: They were all gonna resist anyway, right? I wouldn’t have come back alive if all I did was pay ’em lip service.

speaker: Baten
text: You can say that again! If yer too stupid to understand that, yer too stupid to live!

speaker: Argo
text: ...But why did the government turn to pirates?

speaker: Baten
text: Oh that's easy! There were simply too many of 'em! *paw prints*

speaker: Baten
text: So I had some of them turn to my side and they smashed the others to pieces! Ain’t I a genius?!*😊*

speaker: Unknown
text: Pirates actually agreed to do that?

speaker: Diederich
text: The seas were too crowded and the turf wars were gettin' worse. I was a pirate, but I saw what was comin'.

speaker: Diederich
text: I was gettin' tired of that cut-throat world... Tired of bein' a pirate...

speaker: Argo
text: *(Even pirates have complicated lives...*

speaker: Argo
text: I'm getting hungry...

speaker: Diederich
text: Dinner's almost done, don't go stealin' food.

speaker: Argo
text: I won't

speaker: Baten
text: What are ya, his guardian?

speaker: Diederich
text: I guess you could say I'm somethin' like that.

speaker: Baten
text: Huh? ...So you've gone soft too, huh?

speaker: Argo
text: If you'll excuse me, I should get going.

speaker: Diederich
text: See you later, Argo
